title: rubus indutus
intro: Rubus indutus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus indutus include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as supporting immune function and reducing oxidative stress. Rubus indutus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or jam, and is also used in traditional remedies such as infusions and decoctions.
